ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sales data */,
  "geo" TEXT /* Geographic location of the sales */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle sold */,
  "manufacture_origin" TEXT /* Origin of manufacture of the vehicles */,
  "sales_metric" TEXT /* Metric of sales (e.g., Dollars, Units) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of sales in a specified metric */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the sale was made (e.g., dealership, online) */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., retail, commercial) */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the sale */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the sale */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative who made the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_geo FOREIGN KEY ("geo") REFERENCES geographic_locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_manufacture_origin FOREIGN KEY ("manufacture_origin") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_sales_metric FOREIGN KEY ("sales_metric") REFERENCES sales_metrics ("metric_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_vehicle_type FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_type") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("vehicle_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "vehicle_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type (e.g., Passenger cars, Trucks) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle type */,
  "average_mileage" REAL /* Average mileage of vehicles in this type */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used (e.g., gasoline, diesel, electric) */,
  "standard_features" TEXT /* List of standard features of the vehicle type */,
  "optional_features" TEXT /* List of optional features available for the vehicle type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_locations" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic location */,
  "region" TEXT /* The region to which the location belongs (e.g., North America) */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the geographic location */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the geographic location */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is based */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was founded */,
  "total_employees" INTEGER /* Total number of employees */,
  "annual_production_capacity" INTEGER /* Annual production capacity */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Whether the manufacturing process is automated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales metric (e.g., Dollars, Units) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sales metric */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the metric (e.g., USD, EUR, units) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sales data */,
  "is_fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Whether the year is a fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_forecasting" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales forecast entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the forecast is made */,
  "forecasted_sales" REAL /* Forecasted sales value in dollars */,
  "forecasted_units" INTEGER /* Forecasted number of units to be sold */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used for forecasting (e.g., linear regression, ARIMA) */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_forecasting_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., sales, marketing, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role associated with the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
